hospital: Kapiolani Medical Center for Women & Children
aetna_family_note: Kapiolani does not list Aetna by name. Its only Aetna-family network is Coventry (an Aetna subsidiary) — a different product from Aetna Choice, shown separately and never equated to Aetna's own filed rate.
